assets.alt: Flat head-on owned answer page and source badge on a sky blue and periwinkle mesh background
assets.caption: The strongest AI visibility system connects public employee expertise with owned pages that answer buyer questions clearly.
assets.generation_method: built-in image_gen, saved post-local as PNG
assets.notes: Regenerated with the flat head-on two-color Sell In Public liquid-glass hero process. Background uses one main color plus one close complementary color; graphic is front-facing with no isometric or angled perspective.
assets.final_prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: wide blog hero for Sell In Public blog, final should work as a 1897x829 landscape crop
Source context from article: LinkedIn can help a company show up in AI search when employee expertise is useful enough to cite and is connected to crawlable owned pages with sources, structure, schema, and internal links. The useful system turns public expertise into a durable owned answer surface.
Primary request: Create one simple visual metaphor: one front-facing flat liquid-glass owned answer page with one small source badge beside it. Only two elements. No profile icon, no people icon, no node map, no network graph, no dashboard, no social post card.
Style reference: Sell In Public Flat Liquid Mesh Hero style. Generated raster PNG. Background uses one main color plus at most one close complementary color. Matte translucent liquid-glass shape. Simple head-on flat UI. Consistent white outline weight. Clean negative space. Subtle grain.
Composition: Wide landscape hero near 1897x829. One centered head-on graphic with quiet space around it. The glass/white graphic must be completely flat and viewed straight-on, like a 2D interface parallel to the image plane.
Scene/backdrop: Soft mesh gradient using only sky blue and periwinkle. No third color family. Blend smoothly without hard edges.
Subject: One large front-facing flat liquid-glass answer-page panel with sparse non-readable white line blocks, plus one small simple source badge shape. Use a single clean arrow or bracket only if necessary. No icons made of connected dots.
Detail density: Very low. Simple, spacious, specific, editorial B2B.
Constraints: Generated raster PNG style only. No readable text, logos, watermarks, exact LinkedIn UI, profile icon, people icon, connected dots, node map, network graph, fake metrics, charts, scattered nodes, random lines, icon clouds, fake dashboards, overcomplicated UIs, generic LinkedIn-post-card default, glossy 3D objects, glow, bloom, flares, light trails, shiny/specular/reflection cues, bokeh/orbs, hard gradient edges, SVG/vector look, photoreal stock-photo look, more than two background colors, angled perspective, isometric view, tilted panels, 3D depth, shadows, or three-quarter UI view.
